title: Diplotaxis pendula
taxonomy: Diplotaxis pendula is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. It belongs to the genus Diplotaxis, which consists of various species of cress plants. The plant is a member of the order Brassicales and the class Magnoliopsida. This classification places Diplotaxis pendula in the broader group of dicotyledonous plants. The species is native to the Mediterranean region and parts of western Europe.
